summary: Session 2 (steady-state mechanism, non-final, ships D1-D5; ai_router code, no release): shipped the forward-looking guidance lifecycle. D2 (guidance_meta.py): HTML-comment per-lesson trailer parser/formatter (fixed canonical field order, omit-empty, double-quoted values, multi-value superseded-by/encoded-in), a doc parser that associates each ## heading with its trailer, a surgical byte/CRLF-preserving last-used-set rewrite, and validate_documents enforcing id format (L-<set>-<seq>) + cross-file id uniqueness; plus guidance_config.py (chars/4 token estimate, ceilings/disuse-window from a router-config guidance: block, file discovery) and a validate_guidance_meta CLI. D3 keystone: disposition.lessons_cited (omit-empty + JSON-schema parity + validate_disposition shape check); cite_lessons CLI updates last-used-set in place as part of the commit (surgical), warns [reconsider] on citing an archived id; close_session reads disposition.lessons_cited into the closeout_succeeded event (lessons_cited + non-blocking lessons_cited_unknown via _resolve_lessons_cited) and NEVER mutates markdown; empty list is fully inert. D1: guidance_report (per-file+combined bytes/lines/~tokens, per-active-file ceilings, --check CI gate, opt-in --write-headers stable marker block) + summarize_overhead fail-open advisory + guidance_search (--archive / --archive-only, enclosing-lesson id tag). D4: created docs/planning/lessons-archive.md (never-auto-loaded, seeded empty) and edited all 10 always-load sites (CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI.md, ai-led-session-workflow.md x4, quick-start.md x2, project-guidance.md) to exclude it; added an Active->Archive candidate to the Step 9 reorganization list. D5: evidence-based archive triggers + N=20 disuse window + 10k/6k token backstop ceilings + 'promotion is orthogonal to archival' policy text in lessons-learned.md; over-ceiling advisory chained into start_session (3 sites) + close_session, fail-open + stderr-only + never changes exit status. DOGFOOD: retro-minted ids L-064-1..12 onto this repo's existing lessons (added-set filled only where origin is evident from the text, omitted-as-legacy otherwise -> 6 non-fatal validator warnings, by design), then cited the 4 lessons genuinely instrumental this session (L-064-3 persist-output, L-064-4 ASCII-only, L-064-9 git-add-untracked-before-diff, L-064-10 suite-baseline-up-front) so their last-used-set=064 -- the citation path proven end-to-end on real data. SUITES: Python 1270 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed (was 1221 at S1; +49 new tests); TS 908 passing / 2 failing = the known tracked Set-026 baseline (S2 touched no TS). VERIFICATION: gemini-2.5-pro cross-provider VERDICT VERIFIED, 0 Critical/Major/Minor, R1 clean (up-front conventions block). Routed spend this session ~$0.12 (1 next-orchestrator analysis $0.0016 + verification $0.045, plus ~$0.075 on two failed gemini verify runs where thinking_budget=-1 ate the output before the bounded-budget retry succeeded). No release this session (PyPI keystone + Marketplace bundle land in S4).

reason.specifics: S3 ships a routed bulk-triage classifier, a portable backlog-remediation recipe doc, and a large-context read-only dogfood over the harvester's 154 KB lessons-learned.md; frontier reasoning at high effort keeps the classifier evidence and the projected post-remediation size coherent. Recommendation produced via routed analysis (gemini-pro).
